---
title: "About"
subtitle: "“A walk in nature, walks the soul back home.” – Mary Davis"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elhamali
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Elhamyali
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: youtube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@elhamali6073
      text: Youtube
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: spotify
      text: Unmuted Podcast
      href: https://open.spotify.com/show/3t0HajfVLLDYV7AeqF9oAr
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: globe
      text: Spudnuts Comics
      href: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/spudnuts-comics/list?title_no=847331
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: globe
      text: ADPList
      href: https://adplist.org/mentors/elham-ali
      target: "_blank"
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:elham.yusufali@gmail.com"
      target: "_blank"

engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
#quarto-sidebar-glass {
    display: none;
  }
```

![Photo by Gabby Vera for the City of Santa Clarita, taken during Community Beautification Day at Valencia Glen Park. [Read the full story](https://signalscv.com/2025/06/volunteers-and-city-make-mulch-ado-about-beautification/){target="_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer"}.](/images/home/scv2.jpg)

**10 things to know about me:**

1.  I’m a third culture kid from Bahrain and the Philippines. I'm also a proud <a href="https://www.cpisp.bh/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Crown Prince International Scholar</a>.

2.  Writing and visualizing stories has always been part of my life. My first “book” was a picture story I made in MS Paint at 15 to teach kids Kumon math through animals.

3.  I tell stories through music, too. I was a classical violinist for 14+ years and performed with Mariachi Serrano of the Claremont Colleges and Chippewa Valley Symphony Orchestra.

4.  I’m a researcher and data storyteller focused on climate justice, public health, and health equity.

5.  My work has appeared in *Appetite*, *BMC Public Health*, Public Environmental Data Partners, Beeck Center for Social Impact + Innovation, and more.

6.  I’ve spent 12+ years working with governments, startups, nonprofits, and communities to uncover insights that shape policy, shift norms, and even save lives — from COVID-19 crisis response to health literacy.

7.  One of those stories helped a local health department secure a \$50K grant.

8.  Another helped rebuild trust across a local government's departments through human-centered design for equity practices, including a series of hackathons.

9.  I’m currently writing my doctoral dissertation on parks and green space equity at Johns Hopkins University.

10. My partner and I live in Southern California with our two kitties, Selena and Lilly.

💌 I’m always happy to connect so don’t hesitate to reach out.

<!-- Accessibility widget script -->

```{=html}
<script>
(function(d){
  var s = d.createElement("script");
  s.setAttribute("data-position", "3");
  s.setAttribute("data-account", "M4YO8zAZCv");
  s.setAttribute("src", "https://cdn.userway.org/widget.js");
  (d.body || d.head).appendChild(s);
})(document)
</script>
```
